name: Danske Invest - Danmark Indeks ex OMXC20
summary: Danske Invest - Danmark Indeks ex OMXC20 is a Danish index fund that excludes the OMXC20 index constituents. The fund seeks to replicate the performance of the broader Danish equity market excluding the 20 largest companies, offering exposure to smaller and mid-sized companies. It is managed by Danske Invest and provides diversified exposure to the Danish stock market outside of the largest companies.
